final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output [9:0] count
);

    reg [9:0] obf_counter_reg;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            obf_counter_reg <= 10'b0000000001;  // Reset the counter to 0000000001
        end else begin
            obf_counter_reg <= {obf_counter_reg[8:0], obf_counter_reg[9]};  // Rotate the bits
        end
    end

    assign count = obf_counter_reg;

endmodule
